scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:venv: concurrently "cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
